title: GraphStatsResponse
description: Response emitted by `neurographrag graph stats` on stdout as a single JSON line. Provides aggregate metrics for the entity/relationship graph.

namespace.description: Namespace filter applied, or null when all namespaces are included.

node_count.description: Total number of entity nodes in the selected scope.

edge_count.description: Total number of relationship edges in the selected scope.

avg_degree.description: Average degree (edge count per node) across all nodes.

max_degree.description: Maximum degree observed across all nodes.
